title: Kawaguchi, Saitama — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Kawaguchi is a city in Saitama with a population of 594,000. A convenient Tokyo suburb with a large foreign community, riverside parks, and affordable housing options.
